title: SHARON - single Middle Aged woman, an avid plant collector, she is o
content:
SHARON - single Middle Aged woman, an avid plant collector, she is often seen around the apartment complex moving her plants around, she is probably religious, and maybe she has a snake, or some form of reptiles. She works at a bakery.
TEDDY, SUSAN, NICOLE, OMAR, MICAH - group of college students renting an apartment. These apartments are probably only two bedrooms, so they are really cramped in there, DAVE is often called to their apartment to un clog a toilet, or replace a bulb (their not handy, in fact helpless)—and they often have guests and late night gatherings. Their apartment smells like weed. Teddy and Susan are a couple, she is studying to be a nurse (along with Andrea), he is studying business and wants to move to Manhattan when he graduates. Omar is a musician, but hates the major and just wants to produce music. Micah is studying molecular biology. They have a penchant
FRANK - heroin dealer, cuts his drugs with elephant tranquilizer, this is what kills SHEEN?????

ANIMALS:
ALBERT EINSTEIN - the dog that takes especially to L, often runs away from its owner to spend time with L
